metadata.description: Phase-gated directive framework: Planning -> Design -> Validation -> Execution -> Review

plugins.name: directive-framework
plugins.description: Drive an idea through the phase-gated directive pipeline (Planning -> Design -> Validation -> Execution -> Review) using deterministic intake gates, paired PD/DD planning packets, validated build plans, execution directives, and review directives. Provides the /directives command and a skill wiring the framework's real Python tooling and the planning cockpit.
